---
title: ""
subtitle: ""
author: ""
date: today
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    page-layout: full
execute: 
  keep-md: true
  warning: false
  message: false
editor: visual
reference-location: margin
---

```{r global_options, include=F, warning=F, message=F, echo=F, error=F}
library(here)
library(knitr)
source("../../prep (May 2025).r")
# sna masks gt::gt() — pin the correct one to the global environment
gt <- gt::gt
library(ggrepel)
```

## Introduction



## Setup
